#person #direct #sarah-carter

## Overview

**Name:** Sarah Carter
**Role:** Senior Software Engineer
**Team:** Platform
**Relationship:** direct

## Communication Preferences

> Populated over time. What works, what doesn't.

- Prefers async written updates over status meetings — "if it fits in a Slack message, don't schedule a meeting"
- Responds best to direct, specific feedback — avoids feedback sandwiches, finds them condescending
- Uses Slack for quick questions, email for anything that needs a paper trail
- Prefers deep-work morning hours — avoid scheduling 1:1s before 11 AM
- Will push back on unclear requirements — not a weakness, a strength
- Prefers a doc review over a synchronous walkthrough when evaluating a design
